text.title: Launch Readiness ‚Äî Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `LaunchReadiness` report with 8 gates + go/no-go decision.

list.item: `gates` ‚Äî array of EXACTLY 8 `GateStatus` objects in fixed order
`blockers` ‚Äî array of `{gate, criterion, owner, remediation_plan, new_eta}`
`risk_acceptances` ‚Äî array (empty allowed) of `{gate, reason, accepted_by}` for explicit skip cases
`gate` ‚Äî enum {security, performance, observability, runbooks, on_call, legal, support_enablement, comms_tree}
`criteria` ‚Äî array of `{name, status: enum {pass, fail, n/a}, evidence_url}`

antipattern.reason: Violates r3. Pass requires all criteria green.

list.item: Render report as Markdown for launch-bridge channel pinning.
Aggregate by quarter for trend analysis.
Mask sensitive evidence URLs in shared external versions (compliance audits).
Each gate has a named owner + signed_by + signed_at within 48h of launch.
Explicit risk-acceptances for any n/a criteria.
Blockers have remediation plan + new ETA.
